title: alnus maritima
intro: Alnus maritima, also known as sea beach alder or black alder, is a rare shrub or small tree that is native to the coastal regions of eastern North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Alnus maritima include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as arthritis, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce fever. Alnus maritima can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
